title: perezia squarrosa subsp. cubataensis
intro: Perezia squarrosa subsp. cubataensis, also known as Perezia cubataensis, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Perezia cubataensis is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, to treat conditions like digestive issues and to boost the immune system.
